pi_items.source: Task description instructions to set the extrusion depth parameter to exactly 2.0 mm.
Python code in setup_task.sh that generates the synthetic DXF profile with points at +/- 21.15, corresponding to a width of 42.3.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the NEMA 17 DXF data is synthetically generated via setup_task.sh with an exact 42.3mm width. The task instructions explicitly require an extrusion thickness of 2.0mm, and the expected SLVS and STL output paths match the task description and export_result.sh exactly.
